title: Mr. Virgin
overview: Mr.Virgin is know as NEPAL's first SEX COMEDY film Directed by BISHARAD BASNET in 2018.  STORY  ONE LINE : 3 boys plans to break their virginity one night and goes to THAMEL in Kathmandu and what happens to them one after another. Will these boys will break their virginity.
